name: sanderstar1/kerk-pdf-event-importer
description: WordPress plugin to import events from PDF for Event Organiser.

post-install-cmd: php -r "$zip = new ZipArchive; $zip->open('kerk_pdf_event_importer.zip', ZipArchive::CREATE | ZipArchive::OVERWRITE); function addDir($zip,$dir,$base){foreach(scandir($dir) as $f){if($f=='.'||$f=='..')continue;$path="$dir/$f";$local="$base/$f";if(is_dir($path)){addDir($zip,$path,$local);}else{$zip->addFile($path,$local);}}} addDir($zip,'.','kerk_pdf_event_importer'); addDir($zip,'../vendor','kerk_pdf_event_importer/vendor'); $zip->close();"
